rulings.Case Title: ELSIE SMITH INC. VS. PATRICIA MONTANDON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss (Ccp 583.310; 583.410; 583.420(A))
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 7, 2009, line 15, DEFENDANT PATRICIA MONTANDON'S Motion To Dismiss (CCP 583.310; 583.410; 583.420(A)). Motion to dismiss is denied. CCP section 1141.17(b) tolled the five year statute. Both parties have delayed the litigation in this case. Policy favoring trial or other disposition on the merits is preferred over policy that required dismissal for failure to proceed with reasonable diligence in the prosecution of an action. =(302/CWW/xCH)

rulings.Case Title: ZIAD TAKIEDDINE VS. HANI SALAAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, May 7, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT SPECTRUM AEROSPACE USA, LLC, and, HANI SALAAM'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Motion to Quash is granted as to defendant Salaam. Plaintiff fails to show that he had sufficient minimum contacts to be subject to personal jurisdiction. Motion to quash is denied as to defendant Spectrum Aerospace, as the corporation's address and business activities are adequate to subject it to general jurisdiction under KLM vs. Superior Court (1951) 107 Cal.App.2nd 495. Court declines to rule on forum non-conveniens which may be brought as separate motion. =(302/CWW/JW)
